title: Pneumonia Man (dweller)
body:
Meet Pneumonia Man (or The Pneumonia Dweller) He’s an evil, scary monster who has… well, you can probably guess.

This mod is a half-joke mod—meaning, while the concept started as a joke (it is the Pneumonia Dweller, after all), I actually tried to make it a solid experience. The mod itself is pretty simple: it adds a new biome and a few structures to explore.

I hope you have fun!

(p.s: geckolib is required)

![The Pneumonia Man Himself](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eebd316674a6c7df68f6bf36910c44f281a03136.gif)

 

**Also:** Hellish Horrors v1.3 is almost finished—sorry for the wait!

**NOTE:** This mod is **not intended to be actually scary**, by the way!

**Credits:**

- Original design, model, and concept by **Mycat** _(mycatsaccount123)_
  
- Remodel, animations, retexture, and mod work by Mr. Brain Matter
  
- Mod as a whole created by the **Stupid Idiot Modding Group**
